title: Влияние на типа осеменяване на пчелната майка върху яйценосната й дейност
description: The study assesses the impact of artificial versus natural insemination on the egg-laying performance of honey bee queens during spring and autumn seasons. Field trials in 2021 at three apiaries in the Veliko Tarnovo region using two queen lines (LM-20 and LM-45) revealed statistically significant differences (p < 0.001).
